001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools;
018
019import static java.time.temporal.ChronoField.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.StateEnum.*;
021
022import java.time.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.time.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028
029/**
030 * Date/time matcher factory for the {@link ObjectSearcher} class.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 *    The class provides searching based on the following patterns:
034 * </p>
035 * <ul>
036 *    <li><js>"property=2011"</js> - A single year
037 *    <li><js>"property=2011 2013 2015"</js> - Multiple years
038 *    <li><js>"property=2011-01"</js> - A single month
039 *    <li><js>"property=2011-01-01"</js> - A single day
040 *    <li><js>"property=2011-01-01T12"</js> - A single hour
041 *    <li><js>"property=2011-01-01T12:30"</js> - A single minute
042 *    <li><js>"property=2011-01-01T12:30:45"</js> - A single second
043 *    <li><js>"property=&gt;2011"</js>,<js>"property=&gt;=2011"</js>,<js>"property=&lt;2011"</js>,<js>"property=&lt;=2011"</js> - Open-ended ranges
044 *    <li><js>"property=&gt;2011"</js>,<js>"property=&gt;=2011"</js>,<js>"property=&lt;2011"</js>,<js>"property=&lt;=2011"</js> - Open-ended ranges
045 *    <li><js>"property=2011 - 2013-06-30"</js> - Closed ranges
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ObjectTools">Object Tools</a>
050 * </ul>
051 */
052public class TimeMatcherFactory extends MatcherFactory {
053
054   /**
055    * A construct representing a single search pattern.
056    */
057   private static class TimeMatcher extends AbstractMatcher {
058
059      private static final AsciiSet DT = AsciiSet.of("0123456789-:T./");
060      private static final AsciiSet WS = AsciiSet.of(" \t");
061
062      TimestampRange[] ranges;
063      List<TimestampRange> l = new LinkedList<>();
064
065      @SuppressWarnings({
066         "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
067         "java:S135" // Multiple break statements necessary for state machine error handling
068      })
069      public TimeMatcher(String s) {
070
071         // Possible patterns:
072         // >2000, <2000, >=2000, <=2000, > 2000, 2000 - 2001, '2000', >'2000', '2000'-'2001', '2000' - '2001'
073
074         // Possible states:
075         // S1 = Looking for [<]/[>]/quote/NUM ([>]=S2, [<]=S3, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
076         // S2 = Found [>], looking for [=]/quote/NUM ([=]=S4, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
077         // S3 = Found [<], looking for [=]/quote/NUM ([=]=S4, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
078         // S4 = Found [>=] or [<=], looking for quote/NUM ([']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
079         // S5 = Found ['], looking for ['] ([']=S1)
080         // S6 = Found ["], looking for ["] (["]=S1)
081         // S7 = Found [123"] or [123'], looking for WS (WS=S9)
082         // S8 = Found [2], looking for WS (WS=S9)
083         // S9 = Found [2000 ], looking for [-]/quote/NUM ([-]=S10, [']=S11, ["]=S12, NUM=S13)
084         // S10 = Found [2000 -], looking for quote/NUM ([']=S11, ["]=S12, NUM=S13)
085         // S11 = Found [2000 - '], looking for ['] ([']=S1)
086         // S12 = Found [2000 - "], looking for ["] (["]=S1)
087         // S13 = Found [2000 - 2], looking for WS (WS=S1)
088
089         var state = S1;
090         var mark = 0;
091         var eq = Equality.NONE;
092         String s1 = null;
093         String s2 = null;
094
095         int i;
096         char c = 0;
097         for (i = 0; i < s.trim().length(); i++) {
098            c = s.charAt(i);
099            if (state == S1) {
100               // S1 = Looking for [>]/[<]/quote/NUM ([>]=S2, [<]=S3, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
101               if (WS.contains(c)) {
102                  state = S1;
103               } else if (c == '>') {
104                  state = S2;
105                  eq = Equality.GT;
106               } else if (c == '<') {
107                  state = S3;
108                  eq = Equality.LT;
109               } else if (c == '\'') {
110                  state = S5;
111                  mark = i + 1;
112               } else if (c == '"') {
113                  state = S6;
114                  mark = i + 1;
115               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
116                  state = S8;
117                  mark = i;
118               } else {
119                  break;
120               }
121            } else if (state == S2) {
122               // S2 = Found [>], looking for [=]/quote/NUM ([=]=S4, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
123               if (WS.contains(c)) {
124                  state = S2;
125               } else if (c == '=') {
126                  state = S4;
127                  eq = Equality.GTE;
128               } else if (c == '\'') {
129                  state = S5;
130                  mark = i + 1;
131               } else if (c == '"') {
132                  state = S6;
133                  mark = i + 1;
134               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
135                  state = S8;
136                  mark = i;
137               } else {
138                  break;
139               }
140            } else if (state == S3) {
141               // S3 = Found [<], looking for [=]/quote/NUM ([=]=S4, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
142               if (WS.contains(c)) {
143                  state = S3;
144               } else if (c == '=') {
145                  state = S4;
146                  eq = Equality.LTE;
147               } else if (c == '\'') {
148                  state = S5;
149                  mark = i + 1;
150               } else if (c == '"') {
151                  state = S6;
152                  mark = i + 1;
153               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
154                  state = S8;
155                  mark = i;
156               } else {
157                  break;
158               }
159            } else if (state == S4) {
160               // S4 = Found [>=] or [<=], looking for quote/NUM ([']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
161               if (WS.contains(c)) {
162                  state = S4;
163               } else if (c == '\'') {
164                  state = S5;
165                  mark = i + 1;
166               } else if (c == '"') {
167                  state = S6;
168                  mark = i + 1;
169               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
170                  state = S8;
171                  mark = i;
172               } else {
173                  break;
174               }
175            } else if (state == S5) {
176               // S5 = Found ['], looking for ['] ([']=S7)
177               if (c == '\'') {
178                  state = S7;
179                  s1 = s.substring(mark, i);
180               }
181            } else if (state == S6) {
182               // S6 = Found ["], looking for ["] (["]=S7)
183               if (c == '"') {
184                  state = S7;
185                  s1 = s.substring(mark, i);
186               }
187            } else if (state == S7) {
188               // S7 = Found [123"] or [123'], looking for WS (WS=S9)
189               if (WS.contains(c)) {
190                  state = S9;
191               } else if (c == '-') {
192                  state = S10;
193               } else {
194                  break;
195               }
196            } else if (state == S8) {
197               // S8 = Found [1], looking for WS (WS=S9)
198               if (WS.contains(c)) {
199                  state = S9;
200                  s1 = s.substring(mark, i);
201               }
202            } else if (state == S9) {
203               // S9 = Found [2000 ], looking for [-]/[>]/[<]/quote/NUM ([-]=S10, [>]=S2, [<]=S3, [']=S5, ["]=S6, NUM=S8)
204               if (WS.contains(c)) {
205                  state = S9;
206               } else if (c == '-') {
207                  state = S10;
208               } else if (c == '>') {
209                  state = S2;
210                  l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
211                  eq = Equality.GT;
212                  s1 = null;
213               } else if (c == '<') {
214                  state = S3;
215                  l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
216                  eq = Equality.LT;
217                  s1 = null;
218               } else if (c == '\'') {
219                  state = S5;
220                  l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
221                  mark = i + 1;
222                  eq = null;
223                  s1 = null;
224               } else if (c == '"') {
225                  state = S6;
226                  l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
227                  mark = i + 1;
228                  eq = null;
229                  s1 = null;
230               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
231                  state = S8;
232                  l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
233                  eq = null;
234                  s1 = null;
235                  mark = i;
236               } else {
237                  break;
238               }
239            } else if (state == S10) {
240               // S10 = Found [2000 -], looking for quote/NUM ([']=S11, ["]=S12, NUM=S13)
241               if (WS.contains(c)) {
242                  state = S10;
243               } else if (c == '\'') {
244                  state = S11;
245                  mark = i + 1;
246               } else if (c == '"') {
247                  state = S12;
248                  mark = i + 1;
249               } else if (DT.contains(c)) {
250                  state = S13;
251                  mark = i;
252               } else {
253                  break;
254               }
255            } else if (state == S11) {
256               // S11 = Found [2000 - '], looking for ['] ([']=S1)
257               if (c == '\'') {
258                  state = S1;
259                  s2 = s.substring(mark, i);
260                  l.add(new TimestampRange(s1, s2));
261                  s1 = null;
262                  s2 = null;
263               }
264            } else if (state == S12) {
265               // S12 = Found [2000 - "], looking for ["] (["]=S1)
266               if (c == '"') {
267                  state = S1;
268                  s2 = s.substring(mark, i);
269                  l.add(new TimestampRange(s1, s2));
270                  s1 = null;
271                  s2 = null;
272               }
273            } else /* (state == S13) */ {
274               // S13 = Found [2000 - 2], looking for WS (WS=S1)
275               if (WS.contains(c)) {
276                  state = S1;
277                  s2 = s.substring(mark, i);
278                  l.add(new TimestampRange(s1, s2));
279                  s1 = null;
280                  s2 = null;
281               }
282            }
283         }
284
285         if (i != s.length())
286            throw new PatternException("Invalid range pattern ({0}): pattern=[{1}], pos=[{2}], char=[{3}]", state, s, i, c);
287
288         if (state == S1) {
289            // No tokens found.
290         } else if (state == S2 || state == S3 || state == S4 || state == S5 || state == S6 || state == S10 || state == S11 || state == S12) {
291            throw new PatternException("Invalid range pattern (E{0}): {1}", state, s);
292         } else if (state == S7) {
293            l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
294         } else if (state == S8) {
295            s1 = s.substring(mark).trim();
296            l.add(new TimestampRange(eq, s1));
297         } else /* (state == S13) */ {
298            s2 = s.substring(mark).trim();
299            l.add(new TimestampRange(s1, s2));
300         }
301
302         ranges = l.toArray(new TimestampRange[l.size()]);
303      }
304
305      @Override
306      public boolean matches(ClassMeta<?> cm, Object o) {
307         if (ranges.length == 0)
308            return true;
309
310         ZonedDateTime zdt;
311         if (cm.isCalendar()) {
312            var c = (Calendar)o;
313            zdt = c.toInstant().atZone(c.getTimeZone().toZoneId());
314         } else {
315            var date = (Date)o;
316            zdt = date.toInstant().atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
317         }
318         for (var range : ranges)
319            if (range.matches(zdt))
320               return true;
321         return false;
322      }
323   }
324
325   /**
326    * A construct representing a single search range in a single search pattern.
327    * All possible forms of search patterns are boiled down to these timestamp ranges.
328    */
329   private static class TimestampRange {
330      ZonedDateTime start;
331      ZonedDateTime end;
332
333      public TimestampRange(Equality eq, String singleDate) {
334         var singleDate1 = GranularZonedDateTime.of(singleDate);
335         if (eq == Equality.GT) {
336            this.start = singleDate1.roll(1).roll(MILLI_OF_SECOND, -1).getZonedDateTime();
337            this.end = Instant.ofEpochMilli(Long.MAX_VALUE).atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
338         } else if (eq == Equality.LT) {
339            this.start = Instant.ofEpochMilli(0).atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
340            this.end = singleDate1.getZonedDateTime();
341         } else if (eq == Equality.GTE) {
342            this.start = singleDate1.roll(MILLI_OF_SECOND, -1).getZonedDateTime();
343            this.end = Instant.ofEpochMilli(Long.MAX_VALUE).atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
344         } else if (eq == Equality.LTE) {
345            this.start = Instant.ofEpochMilli(0).atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
346            this.end = singleDate1.roll(1).getZonedDateTime();
347         } else {
348            this.start = singleDate1.copy().roll(MILLI_OF_SECOND, -1).getZonedDateTime();
349            this.end = singleDate1.roll(1).getZonedDateTime();
350         }
351      }
352
353      public TimestampRange(String start, String end) {
354         var start1 = GranularZonedDateTime.of(start);
355         var end1 = GranularZonedDateTime.of(end);
356         this.start = start1.copy().roll(MILLI_OF_SECOND, -1).getZonedDateTime();
357         this.end = end1.roll(1).getZonedDateTime();
358      }
359
360      public boolean matches(ZonedDateTime zdt) {
361         return zdt.isAfter(start) && zdt.isBefore(end);
362      }
363   }
364
365   /**
366    * Default reusable matcher.
367    */
368   public static final TimeMatcherFactory DEFAULT = new TimeMatcherFactory();
369
370   /**
371    * Constructor.
372    */
373   protected TimeMatcherFactory() {}
374
375   @Override
376   public boolean canMatch(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
377      return cm.isDateOrCalendar();
378   }
379
380   @Override
381   public AbstractMatcher create(String pattern) {
382      return new TimeMatcher(pattern);
383   }
384}
